subject: [PATCH v2 3/3] mm/huge_memory: skip device-private PMDs in madvise_free_huge_pmd

reviews.author: David Hildenbrand (Arm)
reviews.summary: Repeated the same comment as in #2, indicating a need for clarification or further discussion.

2026-07-08.patch_summary: This patch series addresses a potential double-put bug in the huge_memory code by skipping device-private PMDs when calling madvise_free_huge_pmd(). The fix involves adding an additional check for device-private entries and continues to out before calling pmd_folio(). This change is necessary due to a potential race condition between HMM-based GPU drivers and madvise(MADV_FREE) calls.
